calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Susan Meller and John Hannum.

Mr. Feder explained the extent of services provided by the Co-Trustees to support the fee request. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Sep-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Re: Internal Affairs Of Trust For Authority For Co-Trustees To Transfer Trust Real Properties To Limited Liability Co.
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Re: Internal Affairs Of Trust For Authority For Co-Trustees To Transfer Trust Real Properties To Limited Liability Co.
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Continued To Oct-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for and with Susan Meller.

The Court stated that it was inclined to allow but not approve the accounting. Mr. Feder addressed the Examiner's notes as set forth on the record. In addition, he stated in the future he would bifurcate the fee requests, that there were seven managers that worked on the Smith Barney portfolio who report to the Conservators, that this is typical for a large portfolio, and that their compensation rises and falls with their successes. Mr. Feder also addressed why so many trades were made stating that according to the broker it was at thirty to forty percent and that this was not an unusual amount; Mr. Feder referred the Court to the declaration filed in November 2008 regarding this matter. In addition, he presented argument to support Ms. Miller fees noting that she had earned them. Finally, Mr. Feder reported that the Conservatee was doing well, that she had recovered from her wound; it had healed, that she was enjoying visits with family, and that she enjoyed watching T.V. The matter (First Account and Report) was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Continued To Mar-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Continued To Jan-12-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
